name: Vasanta
mood: the world in blossom, the air soft and new

name: Grishma
mood: the fierce bright heat before the rains

name: Varsha
mood: the rains breaking over a thirsty land, everything green

name: Sharad
mood: skies washing clean after the monsoon — the festival season

name: Hemanta
mood: the cool, mellow turn toward winter, harvest in the barns

name: Shishira
mood: the still, cold heart of the year, mist at dawn
